default_body.markdown:
## Updates:
- Synced translations from the [Weblate project](https://hosted.weblate.org/projects/zalithlauncher2/)
- Control layout: added support for copying control layouts to a new file


## Changes:
- Joystick: the movable range is now determined by the background shape


## Fixes:
- NeoForge: fixed failure to properly detect and download versions 26.1+
- Update loader: fixed incorrect logic when waiting for the loader list
- Resolution: now calculated using only the Surface size
- LWJGL: fixed missing legacy stb API causing some mods to fail to run properly by [ShirosakiMio](https://github.com/ShirosakiMio)

bodies.markdown:
## 更新：
- 同步 [Weblate 项目](https://hosted.weblate.org/projects/zalithlauncher2/) 语言
- 控制布局：支持复制控制布局到新文件


## 调整：
- 摇杆：摇杆可移动范围由背景形状决定


## 修复：
- NeoForge：无法正确识别并下载 26.1+
- 更新加载器：等待加载器列表逻辑错误
- 分辨率：仅使用 Surface 的大小进行计算
- LWJGL：缺失旧版 stb API 导致部分模组无法正常运行 by [ShirosakiMio](https://github.com/ShirosakiMio)
